# Fripse AI

> Fripse AI helps small businesses work smarter with automation. We design and implement real-world AI systems that eliminate repetitive tasks, improve client communication, and boost profitability — bringing enterprise-level efficiency to everyday businesses without the complexity or cost. Based in the Salt Lake City area, serving Utah and remote.

Fripse AI is an AI consulting and implementation practice for professional service businesses, home service companies, and small businesses. The work is assessment-first: every engagement starts by mapping current workflows to find where AI can save time and make money, then builds the automations that prove it.

## Services

- **AI Automation Strategy** — We map current workflows and identify the highest-leverage places to apply AI.
- **Workflow Optimization** — We rebuild repetitive admin and operations work as automations your team can run day to day.
- **Client Communication Systems** — Automated follow-up, scheduling, reminders, and FAQ-style assistants tuned to your business voice.
- **CRM and Software Integrations** — Connect the tools you already use so data flows automatically.

## Engagement Tiers

- **2 Hour AI Business Checkup** — A fast audit for owners and small teams. You leave with 3 to 5 concrete ways to save time or increase revenue.
- **1 Day AI Deep Dive** — For teams of 5 to 15. We map workflows, find bottlenecks, and deliver a custom AI playbook your team can use immediately.

## Founder

Fripse AI was founded by Dustin Crump (Founder & CEO).

## Important pages

- [Home](https://fripse.com/): Overview of Fripse AI's assessment-first approach to business AI consulting.
- [About](https://fripse.com/about): Company background and Dustin Crump's bio.
- [Assessment](https://fripse.com/assessment): How the AI Business Assessment works and what's included.
- [Book a call](https://fripse.com/book): Schedule a free consultation via Google Calendar.
- [Blog](https://fripse.com/blog): Articles on AI search, GEO, automation, and small-business AI strategy.

- [SMS opt-in policy](https://fripse.com/sms-optin): Required disclosure page for SMS communications.
